columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time when the log entry was generated

columns.name: AssigneeUuid
columns.description: UUID of the user assigned to the incident

columns.name: TriageDuration
columns.description: ISO 8601 duration of the triage process

columns.name: ResponseDuration
columns.description: ISO 8601 duration of the response process

columns.name: DetectionUuids
columns.description: Array of detection UUIDs associated with this incident

columns.name: CreateTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident was created

columns.name: UpdateTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the incident was last updated

columns.name: DeviceUuids
columns.description: Array of device UUIDs affected by this incident

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: Array of tags associated with the incident

columns.name: Metrics
columns.description: Incident metrics including device, executable, and process counts

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connector Friendly Name assigned during connector setup

columns.name: ProductIds
columns.description: ESET product selected for this connector instance (EP, EI, or ECOS)
